⚽ How It Works

From Sign-Up to Champion

Three steps stand between your squad and the prize. Each tournament runs as a single high-energy matchday in Madrid.

01
📋

Register Your Squad

Sign up a team of 7–10 players and pay the entry fee to lock in your spot. Only 8 teams per edition — spots go fast.

02
🏟️

Group Stage

The 8 teams are divided into 2 groups of 4. Each team will play each other within their group. Every goal counts. Top teams 2 teams of each group advance to the knockout semi-finals.

03
🏆

Finals & Cash

Win the final and take all the prize money home. It's winner takes all — only the champions get paid.

💰 Prize Pool

Play for Real Money

The winner takes it all. No consolation prizes — only the champions walk away with cash. Every game matters.

🥇
Champions Only
💶 CASH
Winner takes all — announced per edition. 2nd and 3rd place receive glory, not cash.
📋 Tournament Format

How We Play

Everything you need to prepare your squad for matchday in Madrid.

⚽

Match Rules

  • 7 players per side on the pitch
  • Squad of up to 10 (3 subs allowed)
  • 20-minute halves — no half-time break
  • Offside rules do NOT apply
  • Fair play enforced
  • Referee decisions are final
🏟️

Venue & Logistics

  • Held in Madrid — venue confirmed per edition
  • All matches on artificial turf
  • Arrive 30 minutes before first kickoff
  • Matching kit or official jerseys required
  • Water and refreshments on site
  • Photos and highlights each edition
📊

Group Stage Points

  • Win = 3 pts · Draw = 1 pt · Loss = 0
  • All 8 teams play each other once
  • Top 4 advance to semi-finals
  • Tiebreaker: GD → Goals For → H2H
⚠️

Eligibility

  • Open to all amateur and recreational players
  • Minimum age: 18 years old
  • Entry fee required to confirm spot
  • 8 teams maximum per edition
  • First come, first registered

❓ FAQ

Common Questions

Everything you need to know before signing up your squad.

You need a minimum of 7 players and can register up to 10 (3 substitutes). We recommend 8–9 players for flexibility on the day.
All editions take place in Madrid. The specific venue is confirmed once registration closes and shared with all captains in advance.
The entry fee is announced per edition. Get in touch via Instagram or the registration form for current pricing. Payment locks in your spot.
Absolutely — MPR Kickoff is open to everyone. We've had players from all over Europe. You just need to meet the age requirement (16+) and be in Madrid on the day.
We keep a waitlist of interested teams. If a team drops out, the next on the list gets the spot. Entry fees are non-refundable within 72 hours of the event.
